meaning: complex instruction set computing,复杂指令集计算
examples: Intel's 80x86 family is the quintessential example of CISC.
In fact, most modern CISC processors actually translate their instructions to an internalized RISC format for efficiency.
With the practical situation of ironstone resource utilization in CISC, linear programming is adopted for the optimization model.
Joel Birnbaum was the head of HP Labs at the time and he knew that RISC (Reduced Instruction Set Computing)architecture was the future and not CISC (Complex Instruction Set Computing).
